footerAuto: This email was sent automatically. Please do not reply to this message.
footerLgpd: Your data is protected under data protection law.

base.footerSentBy: This email was sent by {clinic} using AXIEL Core.
base.footerIgnore: If you weren't expecting this email, you can safely ignore it.

welcome.subject: Welcome to {clinic}
welcome.preview: Welcome to {clinic}! Your account has been created.
welcome.heading: Welcome, {name}!
welcome.subtitle: Your registration at {clinic} was created successfully.
welcome.intro: We're glad to have you as a patient. Here you can track your progress, session history and much more.
welcome.portalIntro: Access your patient portal to see your bookings, progress and personalized information:
welcome.portalNote: This link is exclusive to you. Do not share it with others.
welcome.contact: If you have questions or to book your first session, get in touch with the clinic.

apptConfirm.subject: Session confirmed — {date} at {time}
apptConfirm.heading: Session confirmed!
apptConfirm.subtitle: Hi, {name}. Your session is scheduled and confirmed.
apptConfirm.rescheduleQ: Need to reschedule or have a question?
apptConfirm.rescheduleWhats: Get in touch via the clinic's WhatsApp.

apptReminder.subject: Reminder: your session is tomorrow — {time}
apptReminder.preview: Reminder: you have a session {when} at {time}
apptReminder.heading: Session reminder
apptReminder.subtitle: Hi, {name}! You have a session scheduled {when}.
apptReminder.cancelNote: If you need to cancel or reschedule, please let us know in advance.

monthly.subject: {month} report — {clinic}
monthly.heading: {month} report
monthly.rowInactive: 💤 Patients with no session for 30+ days
monthly.tipReengage: 💡 Re-engagement tip: You have {count, plural, one {# patient} other {# patients}} with no session for over 30 days. A personalized message could be the opportunity to resume treatment.
monthly.footerAuto: This report is sent automatically at the beginning of each month by AXIEL Core.

simple.footerGeneric: This message was sent by your clinic.

confirm.title: Booking confirmed ✅
confirm.greeting: Hi, {name}! Your booking has been confirmed successfully.
confirm.portalText: Access your portal to track your bookings and send messages to the clinic.
confirm.subject: ✅ Booking confirmed — {clinic}

reminder.title: Reminder for tomorrow 🗓️
reminder.greeting: Hi, {name}! Just a reminder that you have a session tomorrow.
reminder.subject: 🗓️ Reminder: your session is tomorrow — {clinic}

clinicMsg.title: New message 💬
clinicMsg.body: Patient {name} sent a message through the portal.
clinicMsg.subject: 💬 New message from {name} — {clinic}

patientMsg.title: You have a message 💬
patientMsg.noPortalNote: Access your portal using the link you received earlier to reply.
patientMsg.subject: 💬 New message from {clinic}

nps.title: How was your session? ⭐
nps.greeting: Hi, {name}! Your {sessionType} session at {clinic} has been completed.
nps.sub: Your feedback is very important to help us improve continuously. It takes less than 1 minute!
nps.orNote: Or access your portal and click "Rate session".
nps.subject: ⭐ How was your session? — {clinic}
